inputs.label: Total Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total sales revenue for the period. Based on standard financial reporting (GAAP/IFRS).

inputs.label: Cost of Goods Sold
inputs.businessContext: Direct costs attributable to production. Includes materials, labor, overhead. ISO 9001 cost accounting guidelines.

inputs.label: Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: SG&A, R&D, depreciation, etc. Excludes interest and taxes. Standard income statement classification.

inputs.label: Other Income
inputs.businessContext: Non-operating income (e.g., interest, gains). Included for comprehensive margin calculation.

inputs.label: Effective Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Effective corporate tax rate. Based on jurisdiction and tax laws.

inputs.label: Period Length (Days)
inputs.businessContext: Number of days in the reporting period. Used for annualization if needed.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted outputs. Based on data quality assessment (Six Sigma DMAIC).

hiddenLossDrivers: if grossMargin < 0.2 then 'Low gross margin indicates high COGS or low pricing power'
if operatingMargin < 0.05 then 'Operating expenses are too high relative to revenue'
if netMargin < 0.02 then 'Net margin critically low; risk of loss'
suggestedActions: if grossMargin < 0.2 then 'Review supplier contracts and production efficiency (Lean)'
if operatingMargin < 0.05 then 'Implement cost reduction programs (Six Sigma)'
if netMargin < 0.02 then 'Consider restructuring or strategic pivot'
outputs.dataConfidenceAdjusted: netMargin * (1 - (1 - confidenceFactor)) where confidenceFactor = {low:0.8, medium:0.9, high:1.0}
